entry.title: Re: SAP Analytics Cloud for planning - Data Action for Aggregation on Dimension Property
entry.content:
Hi @guenay

PLG1 and the Material dimension are different dimensions, and the property of PLG1 doesn't affect value aggregation, correct?

Moonjun

entry.title: Microsoft Teams Adapter for SAP Integration Suite
entry.content:
SAP recently introduced the Microsoft Teams adapter as part of its SAP Integration Suite offering. This solution enables seamless integration between Microsoft Teams and SAP Integration Suite, improving communication and automating workflows.  

Organizations can efficiently connect data from various sources to the Microsoft Teams platform, streamlining operations and significantly reducing the effort required to design and implement integration workflows. 

What is Microsoft Teams?

Microsoft Teams is a collaboration platform that is designed to help organizations communicate and collaborate more effectively. Teams combine various tools for chat, video conferencing, file sharing, and task management, all in one place. 

Key Benefits of using the Microsoft Teams Adapter 

The Microsoft Teams Adapter provides the following key features: 
 

  • Supports standard operations on various Microsoft Teams resources like Channel, Team, Member, Message, and Chat. 
  • Supports authentication methods like OAuth2 Authorization Code and OAuth2 Client Credentials. 
  • Supports querying on resources to retrieve the desired output as per your requirements. 
  • Supports pagination using the Get Next Results Page operation. 
  • You can perform operations at the user level (Delegated Permission) and organization/admin level (Application Permission).

How to use the Microsoft Teams Adapter?

The Microsoft Teams adapter is available as part of your SAP Integration Suite license. 

To use the adapter, you must first add it to your Integration Flow, add the required Connection parameters, and configure it as per your Processing requirements. Once you have configured the Microsoft Teams adapter, the SAP CI tenant enables data exchange at runtime by sending a request to the Microsoft Teams receiver system.  

Finally, after processing this request, Microsoft Teams sends back the required data to SAP. The Microsoft Teams adapter can help you exchange the data between Microsoft Teams and other systems. 

Let us look at a simple operation: adding members to a team in bulk in Microsoft Teams using the Microsoft Teams Adapter for SAP Integration Suite. 

Adding members in bulk to a team 

Our example illustrates how the Microsoft Teams Adapter allows you to add the team member in bulk. The integration flow begins with a client initiating a request to an endpoint to send the member information to Microsoft Teams.  

Request Payload Setup using Content Modifier 

We use a Content Modifier to include the request payload that provides the information about the users to be added as members to the team. The request body shown above demonstrates how two users can be added to the team.  

Users can be specified in the body by either their User IDs or their principal names. A combination of both methods is used in the body above. This approach allows for adding up to 200 members to a team, all of which can be specified in the request body. 

How to Connect to Microsoft Teams? 

The connection tab contains the following fields: 

Parameter 

Description 

Address 

Specify the address for the Microsoft Teams service. 

Default: https://graph.microsoft.com 

Authentication 

Select the authentication method and permission type: 'Delegated' for user-level access, 'Application' for app-level access. 

  • OAuth2 Client Credentials(Application Permissions) 
     
  • OAuth2 Authorization Code(Delegated Permissions) 

Credential Name  

Specify the security artifact for the selected authentication type to connect to the Microsoft Teams account. 

Reuse Connection 

Enable this property to reuse the connection. 

Connection Timeout (in ms) 

Specify the maximum waiting time (in milliseconds) for the connection to be established. 

Response Timeout (in ms) 

Specify the maximum waiting time (in milliseconds) for a response message to be received. 

Execute Operation using the Microsoft Teams Adapter 

 We begin by configuring the adapter within the processing tab, selecting Member as the resource and choosing the Add Team Members in Bulk operation.  

This operation allows us to add up to 200 members to a team in a single request, with all the details of the members to be added specified in the request body. After configuring the adapter, we provide the Team ID of the team where the members will be added. 

If any additions fail, the response provides detailed information, specifying which memberships were successfully added and which ones encountered issues. 

It is important to note that the addition of members may take some time to reflect within the team. To track any membership changes, we can subscribe to change notifications, which will alert us to updates regarding membership changes in the specific team. 

Quick Links 

For detailed information about Microsoft Teams adapter configuration, see Microsoft Teams Receiver Adapter and Microsoft Teams Adapter Guide. 

Note: The Microsoft Teams adapter is available as part of your SAP Integration Suite license.

entry.title: Re: Using Postman for API Testing with XSUAA
entry.content:
Hi mariusobert,

This is really a very informative guide, thanks a lot!

Just I am little bit confused about you said "

... To counter this threat, the access tokens are usually only be passed between software components and not exposed to the user! This is the reason why the approuter attaches the JWT token to the request.

To summarize, the approuter enforces that the current user is signed in and attaches the JWT token it received from the XSUAA to all requests that are redirected to other services.

"

Do you mean each time user sends a request to AppRouter without the JWT token, it is the AppRouter attach the JWT token to the request and then route to other components? Is AppRouter stateless how it know the user?

My understanding is the JWT token will passed to user and stored in browser, is it true?

Thanks again for this great post!

 

Best Regards,

Jeremy Cao

entry.title: Re: TRM Transaction Management - Reverse Cash Flow

Hello, Thank you very much for your question.

Have you already checked the SAP Help Portal information?

Create Cash Flow Transactions

Reverse Payments and Postings from TRM Transactions (1) - via Reversal of Transaction

Kind regards,

Henrike

entry.title: MRP AREAS |MASS LEVEL with different "REORDER POINTS" "LOT SIZING" "MAXIMUM STOCK"
entry.content:
Is there any way out we can upload MASS level Material MRP AREAS along with different "Reorder Points" "Lot Sizing" "Maximum Stock"

I have seen the provided solutions by Experts with RMMDDIBE which is only for same "REORDERING POINTS"

entry.title: How to remove sensitive/ security entry of the case which is accidently updated by customer side.
entry.content:
In case *** , we comment Credential info in the ticket directly.
From security consideration, please help to remove that comment message.



------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How to remove sensitive/ security entry of the case w...
entry.content:
A customer can remove an attachment they have added to an incident/case only if it has never been sent to SAP. Once it has been viewed from either side (customer or SAP), it cannot be removed, because one side may have been referring to it in the incident/case.

Only in exceptional cases — for example, if an attachment or text entry contains PII or customer-sensitive data — can it be removed by SAP.

When a request for deletion comes from a customer, the customer must report an incident/case for component XX-SER-FORME. Also when they reach out to SAP CIC requesting the deletion in the already opened ticket.

It is important the following is provided in the deletion request incident/case so that it is clear that it was initiated by the customer, by whom and when:

  • Incident/case number that contains the attachment or external memo that needs to be deleted
  • For an external facing memo, provide the exact date of the memo
  • Attachment file name and description
  • Entered by
  • Included on Date
  • Reason for deletion request

entry.title: Re: How to check if customer invoice is paid in ByD via O...
entry.content:
Hello,

 

BO should be TradeReceivablesPayablesRegister.
But you can use Reporting OData.


Go to Business Analytics - Design Reports WOC.
Select [Accounts Receivable - Line Items] report.
Click [Build OData Queries].
Select Attributes and Filters as you want.
Then you can create OData query service.

 

Ref : OData for SAP Business ByDesign Analytics 

Hope this helps.

 

Regards,

May

Routing error for Annotation File xxxx_VAN' Version '0001' based on Service XXXX_0001 in /n/IWBEP/REG_VOCAN it's all good and clearing the caches • /n/IWFND/CACHE_CLEANUP • /n/IWBEP/CACHE_CLEANUP did help either. No GENFLAG is set In ST01 the 400 bad request is shown but no stil no idea how to solve this. Removed the service and reregister the service wihout any luck

entry.title: Re: SAP Analytics Cloud for planning - Data Action for Aggregation on Dimension Property
entry.content: In this Case we have Material as Dimension and PLG1 ist a Property of this Material Dimension.

entry.title: Set a field as mandatory (Manage Sales Quotations - Version 2 and Manage Business Partner)
entry.content:
Hi Experts, 

we want to set a custom field as mandatory in the App "Manage Sales Quotations - Version 2". We have also found a custom logic for this use case (Custom Field Properties in Sales Document Headers - SD_SLS_FIELDPROP_HEAD or Custom Field Properties in Sales Document Items - SD_SLS_FIELDPROP_ITEM). 

The problem is that the BAdI is only called when I use the “old” app "Manage Sales Quotations" (HTML GUI) and not via the new app "Manage Sales Quotations - Version 2". However, we want to get our customers to work with the new apps for usability reasons and it is also much easier to display the custom fields at a certain point in the apps.

Is there a solution for this? Can the BAdI also be called via the new app? 

For Business Partner (Manage Business Partner), I have not found any custom logic to make a field mandatory. Is there a solution?

Kind Regards

Katharina

entry.title: Re: Purging data in SAP BW4HANA
entry.content:
Hi

1. https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_BW4HANA/107a6e8a38b74ede94c833ca3b7b6f51/b912a621e66c4da3a0a577da178bad47.html?locale=en-US

2. You can use:

  • Delete Content
  • Selective Deletion

Also see:
3232938 [BW Central KBA] How-To: Data Management for BW Infoprovider tables

Currently the exported excel has two rows for dimension and measure:

Thank you of the help.

Jason

entry.title: Global variable for all pages - SAC
entry.content:
Hi experts,
I am creating a dashboard with multiple pages. On a hidden page, I have created my code necessary to populate the script variables. I call these variables as dynamic text on my home page, which does not contain the tables present on the hidden page. I thought it would be sufficient to create the script variable with the flag on expose URL to call it on the other page, but it doesn't work. The value comes as 'undefined'. Can you help me transfer this variable from the hidden page with the JavaScript code to another within the same story?"
Is there anything else you need help with?

Thanks

entry.title: Add Custom Headers for message logging of unique identifiers in CPI iflows:
entry.content:
Add Custom Headers for message logging of unique identifiers in CPI iflows:

Rationale – Most of the times, we might want to search with unique identifiers as the message volume might be high & we do not want to search based on message ID

In that case, we can log the needed value as custom Header/Property & search it on the message monitoring page

IFLOW steps:

  1. Create a header with content modifier to be added as custom Header on the message

  1. Add the groovy script to assign the required header/property as the custom Header

  1. Navigate to Monitor & click on Expand/collapse arrow to see other options for monitoring

  1. In the custom header, search with <customHeader>=<value> to get the specific message

Once the message has been processed, use the corresponding request from the Postman collection to get the message for a particular po_number value. Since the custom header properties are stored as name/value pairs, the request looks like this:

https://{{cpi_designtime_url}}/itspaces/odata/api/v1/MessageProcessingLogCustomHeaderProperties?$filter=Name eq 'OrderNo' and Value eq '12345'&$expand=Log&$format=json

Regards,

Rohini Potham

entry.title: Re: Production order GR .Document XXXXXXX does not contai...
entry.content:
Hello @MO_Lee , Production order may be set with final delivery marked (AFPO-ELIKZ), hence you may not be able proceed order further.

Regards

Prasath

entry.title: Requirement to Display Two Sales Org Addresses on MSDS
entry.content:
Dear All,

We have a requirement to display two Sales Org addresses on the MSDS. Currently, using the standard symbol EHS_SNNAM*, we are only able to display one address—the one configured in the Sales Org settings.

I’d like to know if there is any way to include both addresses.

Please note:
We would prefer not to manage this at the specification instance level, as it would require maintaining addresses for each individual specification, which would be highly cumbersome for the business.

Appreciate your insights on possible alternatives or custom solutions.

Regards,

Rohan

entry.title: Re: How do setup IAS login page for Onboardee and SSO pag...

entry.title: A script attempting to access SAP GUI
entry.content:
My SAP non prod screen is enabled for screen recording but still when i make an action while recording the screen using enable now producer receiving this pop up and its clocking not recoding the action which i make.

I had even tried to re-install enable now launcher still facing same issue. 

WPB_CLOUD entries also there. 

Regards

Ramya T

entry.title: How to use events in SAP business accelerator hub in SAP Build?
entry.content:
Hi guys,

We are trying to automate a process whenever an employee is hired through success factors. The general overview is that:

1. New employee is onboarded in SF and the EmployeeHire event in SF will be triggered

2. A process in SAP Build Process Automation is called when the event above is triggered, and should automatically start the process flow

Upon browsing, we saw in SAP Business Accelerator Hub these SF events and tried to use it as the event trigger in SBPA, however, we do not know how the 2 will connect. 

The steps we've currently taken are

1. Under SAP Build > Connectors > Events > Create > choose SAP Business Accelerator Hub as event source > Filter products to only show SAP SuccessFactors > choose an event package (for trying out purposes, we've chosen Employee Central Position Notification Events)

2. Create new SAP Build Process Automation > Create Process > choose Wait for an event as trigger > choose Employee Central Position Data processed

After above steps, we are now in the dark on what are the next steps. One of our main questions is that how will SBPA know which SF system to listen to? Where should this be set/configured? Once these connections are done, are there other steps that we need to do? Any help on how we can achieve the general overview is very much appreciated.

Thanks,

erza

entry.title: Recurring allowance is not split for retro change in IT0186
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

IT14 Recurring allowance is not prorated for backdated updates in IT0186 for SG payroll.

For Example, Basic pay (OW) in IT0008 of $5,000 and Housing allowance (OW) in IT0014 of $1,000.
1) Jan25 payroll is processed and exited for this foreign staff who is exempted from CPF (No CPF)> Correct
2) Staff obtained PR (Converted from foreigner to PR-Permanent Resident) which is effective from 16th Jan and there is a backdated IT0186 update for Jan'25 as follows
01.01.2025 to 15.01.2025 EXEMPT
16.01.2025 to 31.12.9999 PR
3) Upon running Feb'25 payroll, for retro month of Jan'25 there is a split in basic pay due to IT0186 change and is prorated
01.01.2025 to 15.01.2025 $5000/31*15 = $2,400 (approx) -> No CPF > Correct
01.01.2025 to 15.01.2025 $5000/31*16 = $2,600 (approx) -> subjected to CPF > correct
4) But the same is not applied for housing allowance. There is no spli and all $1,000 is subjected to CPF. we need to contribute to CPF only from the day he becomes PR.

Note:
* We are using the standard schema RLM1 (for CPF calculations)
* When i run Jan'25 payroll again after IT0186 update (instead of Retro in Feb), the housing allowance is prorated as expected.
01.01.2025 to 15.01.2025 $1,000/31*15 = $400 (approx) -> No CPF
01.01.2025 to 15.01.2025 $1.000/31*16 = $600 (approx) -> subjected to CPF

Please advise why retro CPF calculations are incorrect for recurring allowances (point 4 above). Thanks

DM

entry.title: Re: SAP Analytics Cloud for planning - Data Action for Aggregation on Dimension Property

entry.title: Re: S_TABU_LIN object not being checked -> failed to load...
entry.content: You could put a breakpoint in CL_RSDMDM_OBJ_ROOT->GET_MASTER_DATA and then open the master data maintenance of the given characteristic with the problematic user (which gets "failed to load data") and debug it through to see if there are any exceptions happening and if there is anything where and what exactly raises it.

entry.title: Re: Azure /IAS User filtering
entry.content:
Hello  tskwin

Did you do a run with this setup? 

I have the same setup and my run initially took an hour and with these params set it reduced to 15 minutes.

So this should only select the users that are part of the filtered groups

 

aad.group.filter = startsWith(displayName,'SAP_')

aad.user.filter.group.filter.combine = true

 

br

Sander

entry.content:

I assume you have developer access to a S/4HANA public cloud development system. 
Please make sure you have the following business catalog assigned to your developer role: SAP_A4C_BC_DEV_AIQ_PC, see screen shot.

Regards
Karl

entry.title: UI5 loading base uri not loading correctly
entry.content:
hi all, new to sap ui5 and fiori

Working through the ui5 sdk demo kit JavaScript tutorials, managed to get to tutorial 25 and having difficulty understanding how why the baseuri "https://services.odata.org" is not being called when i load the application. it appears to still be attempting to use localhost as the base uri

this is my error below, help would be much appreciated

info graph:helpers:ui5Framework Using OpenUI5 version: 1.135.0
Server started
URL: http://localhost:8080
(node:28304) [DEP0060] DeprecationWarning: The `util._extend` API is deprecated. Please use Object.assign() instead.

(Use `node --trace-deprecation ...` to show where the warning was created)


[HPM] Error occurred while proxying request localhost:8080/Northwind/Northwind.svc/$metadata?sap-language=EN to https://services.odata.org/ [UNABLE_TO_GET_ISSUER_CERT_LOCALLY] (https://nodejs.org/api/errors.html#errors_common_system_errors)

entry.title: Standard Localization - Organizational Structure
entry.content:
Dear SAP Community,

Our clientis currently working on the roll-out of the public cloud for locations in various countries. With regard to the organizational structure, they would like to use SAP's standard numbers as a guide.
For example, the standard company code for Germany is 1010, for the USA 1710.
Is there an overview of the standard organizational units for the different countries?

We would be very happy to hear from you!

Best regards
Talke

entry.title: Re: Primary Email in Onboarding
entry.content: Hello, has anyone found a solution for how to change the 'Is Primary' flag from 'Yes' to 'No' for a personal email address in the Manage Pending Hires step, in case the REC module is not implemented?

entry.title: FX Rates deviation at the time of customer Receipt
entry.content:
We are facing an issue in FX rates deviation in customer receipts and while doing the BRS run.

While we are posting the customer receipts, we will provide the FX rates manually in post incoming payments screen.

And whenever we are running the BRS, system automatically taking the FX rates based on the posting date which we maintained in currency exchange rate application.

So now we have identified a difference between the FX rate used in customer receipt accounting and the day-wise FX rate considered by the system during BRS clearing.

Is there any configuration to use the same FX rate for BRS clearing as the one we used for customer receipt accounting without making any changes in currency exchange rate application?

Kindly provide the support at earliest possible.

 

Regards,

Srinivas

entry.title: About semantic tags

Hi Dear experts,

Regarding the scope of semantic tags, we would like to inquire about the following:
① What functionalities can be achieved by configuring semantic tags in accounting items? 

 

② Does the FX semantic tag have other applications besides selecting accounts subject to foreign currency valuation? (★Is it safe to remove accounts not requiring foreign exchange valuation?)

Please suggest.

Thank you very much.Best Regards!

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Finance

entry.title: Re: Column editable on Fiori Element List report
entry.content:
Thank you @Chamdeep557 for sharing quick suggestions, I am using RAP Odata V4 fiori element list report with Grid Table and as @richadwivedi mentioned this approach doesn't work with it. I am able to achieve it with different approach by adding new column in UI and mapping it with backend property. Then in Behavior definition and implementation in Update method, modifying the entity.

Also regarding the OnInit method, it triggers after creating extension controller for the app where it overrides the 4 hook lifecycle methods. Thanks again for the help, appreciate your time. 🙂

Thanks,

Best Regards,

Raina

entry.title: Re: Blog It Forward - Shiroh Kinoshita
entry.content:
It was a joy reading your post, Shiro
It's a very inspiring story, culture and community remind how essential is to keep the human side while working with SAP, especially across time zones.
If I'm not wrong, it was now around 10 years since our first contact in old SNC :-), you help me a lot, and I'll always appreciate it.
Let's continue building bridges between regions; the SAP community must be a global family.

entry.title: Accessing association's data when calling a CDS via web API (V2 or V4 odata).
entry.content:
Hello, i have created a pretty simple cds view entity.
I have created a service definition and a service binding to V2 API Odata.
I have a problem with accessing association's data when using an API call (via transaction /IWFND/GW_CLIENT ).
When i work with it in "Eclipse" i can follow the association _item and view the results supplied by it.However I have a problem when i try to access the data supplied by association _item, when executing an API call to the service via sap transaction: /IWFND/GW_CLIENT.

View definition:

@AbapCatalog.viewEnhancementCategory: [#NONE]
@AccessControl.authorizationCheck: #NOT_REQUIRED
@EndUserText.label: 'test order'
@Metadata.ignorePropagatedAnnotations: true
@ObjectModel.usageType:{
    serviceQuality: #X,
    sizeCategory: #S,
    dataClass: #MIXED
}
define view entity ztest_order as select from vbak
      
association [1..*] to vbap as _item on 
    $projection.Salesorder = _item.vbeln

{
    key vbeln as Salesorder,
    kunnr as SoldToParty,
    _item
}

 Service definition:

@EndUserText.label: 'x'
define service Ztest_order01_srv {
  expose ztest_order;
}

request with correct result:

request:
/sap/opu/odata/sap/ZTEST_ORDER01_SRV_V2/ztest_order('2567')
result:
{
"Salesorder" : "2567",
"SoldToParty" : "1810146"
}

Request with attempt for accessing association _item:

request:
/sap/opu/odata/sap/ZTEST_ORDER01_SRV_V2/ztest_order('2567')?$expand=_item
response:
{
  "error" : {
    "message" : {
      "lang" : "en",
      "value" : "Resource not found for the segment '_item'."
    },
    "innererror" : {
      "Error_Resolution" : {
        "SAP_Transaction" : "For backend administrators: use ADT feed reader \"SAP Gateway Error Log\" or run transaction /IWFND/ERROR_LOG on SAP Gateway hub system and search for entries with the timestamp above for more details",
        "SAP_Note" : "See SAP Note 1797736 for error analysis (https://service.sap.com/sap/support/notes/1797736)"
      }
    }
  }
}

Please share thoughts how to solve this problem.

entry.title: Re: Error fiori app generator failed
entry.content: @ThinhHoang0108 are you still having this issue? The exception being thrown is related to the writing phase which is exceuted after you have selected the template and populated the project attributes. Can you please try to create a dev SAP Fiori dev space and see if the issue perists? I'm not able to reproduce this issue. Thanks. John

entry.content:

Best regards,
Ivelina

entry.title: Re: Accessing association's data when calling a CDS via web API (V2 or V4 odata).
entry.content: What i expect is to be able to see sales order item's data in the web API call, accessed from VBAP which is referred by association _item.

entry.title: SolMan Monitoring Oracle Locks
entry.content:
We had a massive problem during the days, which led to the fact that our production system went massively from the response times to the basement. The analysis showed a hold in the Oracle Lock Monitor that lasted the system. This hold stood for more than 1 hour. 

My question is that it is somehow possible to use SAP tools, such as SolMan, to configure monitoring that starts after a certain hold time/locktime.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: SolMan Monitoring Oracle Locks
entry.content:
There is no SAP Standard metric under Oracle Database template to check Oracle Database table locks.

I would suggest to create a CCMS node according to https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_NETWEAVER_DBOS/04c4c12784b7488a83cd47eeed818d59/456d8d7a616d1f88e10000000a1553f6.html?locale=en-US

Then you can check the CCMS node status creating a System Monitoring custom metric:

##2614086    Monitor CCMS metrics using System Monitoring custom metrics

##2506790    How to Create a Custom Template to change metrics, thresholds or alerts in a SAP standard template - SAP Solution Manager

entry.title: Re: Issue in Storage Location Determination in SAP ECC PP...
entry.content:
Hello @dineshudl , I am usure about system version, However could you please try refer this note 616987 - Issue storage location not taken from production version.

Regards

Prasath

entry.title: Re: Implementation of German Electronic Invoices in SAP S...
entry.content: Thank you for this excellent question. We've set up Romanian e-invoicing for a Hungarian Company Code, which works really well.

entry.title: Re: How to delete null entries/values during calculation...
entry.content: MoonJun, Does DELETE() not delete the record itself? So when a record is being deleted, it should delete all all measures for that record?

entry.title: Re: First Half 2025 Release: What is New for SAP SuccessFactors Performance & Goals?
entry.content:
Hello @MayaraTabone 

I'm testing the latest performance experience in preview instance.

There are a few issues during the test.

1. Participants can input section comments but Section comments are not saved and participants can not see any comments by any participants include themselves after input. It is described as a known issue in below KBA, but the behavior seems a little different from what I have checked. Also it was planed to be fixed on 29th April, but till today 9th May the issue still consists, this is a very critical issue that will determine whether we can enable the latest experience in production instance, when will this be fixed?
3596704 - Missing section comment in signature/completed step when latest experience of Performance Management forms is enabled - 1H2025 - SAP for Me

2. It is the admins who need RTE not the end users. Is it possible to improve the experience of RTE on manage templates and forms (I find there are some improvement for example the way to insert an image but we need more)? For example the window of section description is fixed size, it's impossible for an admin to edit the section description easily, and also many html tags and attributes are disabled so even you edit the html source from provisioning and check the preview result from there you will only get a different result that you never expected. For our client (an international manufacturer) it is a disaster to enable RTE for end users. Because most of them don't know how to use RTE and the html tags will appear in all type of reports except the print view of form even if no one is using RTE purposely. This will cost admins great effort to deal with.

entry.title: Re: Configuration SupportBackbone
entry.content:
Hello David,

We have the Baltimore CyberTrust Root CA certificate in our system in STRUST, which was set up as part of the SAP Support Backbone configuration. As we know, the certificate will expire on May 12th. How does this affect the functionality of SAP Support Backbone and what measures need to be taken to avoid the impact?

-Sri

entry.title: Re: Access Control - Assessment of users, roles and their...
entry.content:
Hi olgavlachova,

I appreciate your prompt detailed response. It really helps me to cope up getting familiarized and in-depth with security concept.
 
- Are mentioned businesses separated by organizational values (Company Code, etc.)? 
  
   This is the one I need to figure out first. But don't know how to. Can you guide me on this?
 
- Does exist SAP Authorization Concept describing SAP roles, their content and who is responsible for?
 
I believe there's one Administrator who handles the Security roles, etc.
 
- Which version of SAP GRC AC are you running?
 
Since I'm new to the project, I don't think their system has GRC. (ECC system)
 
- Do you have implemented BRM including Access Control Owners and are Role Owners defined?
 
      I'm not familiar with BRM, sorry.
 
- And do you have implemented Access Risk Analysis and adjusted SoD matrix?
 
Is it something feasible with ECC system? How does it work?

Thank you.

Can anyone help me in resolving this.

I am able to achieve it with Responsive table where the row is greyed out but its making the navigation to object page disable as well and due to which other column values are unknown.

I need to change the table to Grid table but in V4, I am not getting table object instance in OnAfterRendering event so that I use UI table events.

Help and suggestions are much appreciated.

Thanks,

Best Regards,

Raina

entry.title: SAP Signavio Best practices and overlays
entry.content: In SAP Signavio, do the pre-modeled processes from the Value Accelerator Library automatically include business roles (such as buyer, controller, quality manager) associated with individual tasks as overlays, or does the user need to add them manually?

entry.title: Icons and Criticality in Analytical Table - OdataV2
entry.content:
Hello Community,

First of all, it must be mentioned that this post refers to oData V2. Unfortunately, V4 still does not support analytical tables..

What is the best way to implement an icon as a column in the analytical table? And without also showing a second column with the icon URI.

In my case, I have a larger “CASE-WHEN” condition in a CDS view that returns several URIs for SAP icons in a column. Since “@Semantics.imageUrl: true” only works in Odata V4 and unfortunately not in V2, I have added a column via extension with the Icons.

However, this only works as long as I also show the second column with the URI. If I hide this column with @ui.hidden: true”, the icons disappear. Which makes sense from my point of view. But even if I include this column in the oData and only hide it in the frontend, the icons disappear.

The problem has also existed with Criticality for over 5 years. Here too, the column with the criticality status must always be visible in the analytical table, otherwise the colors disappear again. But in the responsive Table it works. 

Is there a sensible workaround to continue to work around the problem or is there already a solution from SAP?


regards,

Lars

entry.title: Re: SAP Analytics Cloud for planning - Data Action for Ag...
entry.content:
Hi @guenay 

Please refer to the below Advanced Formulas script to get your expectation. 

MEMBERSET [d/Measures] = "Amount"
MEMBERSET [d/Date] = "202501"

VARIABLEMEMBER #PLG1_total OF [d/Material]

FOREACH [d/Material].[p/PLG1]
	DATA([d/Account] = "COMA032_%", [d/Material] = #PLG1_total)
	= RESULTLOOKUP([d/Account] = "COMA032_%")
	
	IF RESULTLOOKUP([d/Account] = "COMA032_%") != Null THEN
		DATA([d/Account] = "COMA032_%_Material")
		= RESULTLOOKUP([d/Account] = "COMA032_%", [d/Material] = #PLG1_total)
	ENDIF
ENDFOR

This is an AF script logic that temporarily stores subtotals by property in the variable member #PLG1_total, and then records those subtotals into the account "COMA032_%_Material" and the corresponding Material member.

I hope this is helpful to you, and if I have misunderstood anything, please feel free to reach out.

Moonjun

entry.title: Re: Data Initialization Issue in CAP Java Project with HA...
entry.content:
Thank you,

I tried running the command:

cds deploy --auto-undeploy

and in the prompt, I saw the following message:

successfully deployed to db.sqlite

After performing the deploy, the tables were cleared as expected.

Here is my deployment procedure for all environments:

cf login --sso

mbt build -t gen --mtar mta.mtar (this generates a folder within the project containing the mtar file, which is the one I deploy)

cf deploy gen/mta.mtar

I opened the generated mtar file, but I do not see any .csv files inside it. However, the database still gets cleared during the deployment. Could you help me understand why this is happening?

Thank you again for your support!

entry.title: Re: Performance Evaluation Form Routing Exception
entry.content:
Hello 

Hope you're doing well!

As per the current system functionality, it is not possible to configure a business rule to skip a specific route map step. However, a viable workaround is to set up the 'Manager Assessment' step as an iterative step. In this configuration, the manager can be defined as the entry user and the second-level manager as the exit user.

This setup will provide the first-level manager with two options:

  • 'Send to Next Step'
  • 'Send to Second-Level Manager'

For employees who require a second-level review, the manager can route the form accordingly. Otherwise, they can directly move it to the next step in the process.

Thanks,

Amaan

.

entry.title: Re: Entry and Flow of S/4 HANA CATS Time Records
entry.content:
Hi Renee,

First of all, thank you for your detailed explanation about CATS. I was able to successfully enter an employee's time in the timesheet, however, I’m currently facing an issue when trying to transfer the data to PS via CAT5.

When I check CATSDB, the status of the WBS element is 30, which should allow the transfer. However, when I use CATA to transfer the data to both CO and PS, only the CO records appear. For PS, the system displays a message saying that there are no records to transfer.

Could you please advise on what might be causing this constraint?

entry.title: Re: Can't use created Integration Suite capabilities
entry.content: clear the cache or try to log in using incognito browser if you have already given the roles.

entry.title: Re: Understanding Lot Sizing Method "Target Stock Level" in SAP BusinessByDesign
entry.content:
Hi,

Thanks for the extraordinary explanation. It was really very practical and very well exposed.

I have tested and it works as you indicate with only one excepction.

You say:

In other words, the quantity of proposal shall be the maximum of the following.

  • 1. quantity difference between the target stock level to the stock level at that moment. Which is 140 EA (Target stock level 150 EA – Stock level 10 EA).

    2. quantity to make the projected stock as 0. Which is 90 EA

     

    In my tests, the proposals are not for the maximum or both but it generates the proposal applying the second option: quantity to make the projected stock as 0.

    What could it be the resason for this behaviour in the system?

     

    Thanks in advance,

entry.title: SRM Limit orders with single line - Multiple VAT Invoice
entry.content:
Hello experts,

A limit Purchase Order (PO) has been created with only one line item, but the invoice received includes multiple tax codes. When the cogent team scans and sends the invoice, only one tax code appears in the cockpit.

Solution: How can we handle this situation in SAP SRM 7.0?

#SAP #SAPSRM

entry.title: HanaDB Instance in Free tier deleted, now I cannot delete the service
entry.content:
Hello,

created a free tier HanaDB in BTP. Used it for months but it was left untouched for some time and the db was eventually deleted (after 30 days).

Bit of a nuisance, but no big deal as the data can easily be re-created. But now the related BTP services cannot be deleted:

Any ideas?

Unfortunately the applications bound to this service cannot be deleted either due to the same error.

New schema services try to bind to the deleted hanadb, so again, no joy.

I will try creating a new free hanadb in a different space, but is there any other way to entirely remove the original one?

You will have to know/select  the project though.

entry.title: Re: Integrating SAP Digital Manufacturing with Microsoft Teams: A Comprehensive Guide
entry.content:

entry.title: Re: Conflict Using Fixed Bin & General Storage Strategies...
entry.content:
Hi @Shubham120798 ,

the idea of "General Storage Area" is to have a storage type, where all products are just collected in one bin and there is no real putaway logic. An example would be the CL-AREA.

If you want to use the fixed bin strategy, I'd propose you create another storage type for these bins.

Best regards,
Christian

entry.title: Guidance on Monthly Financial Data Upload to S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition
entry.content:
Dear Finance and Technical Experts,

I would greatly appreciate your suggestions and insights regarding the monthly upload of financial data into SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition (2SL) from Oracle NetSuite, which is used by another company within the same corporate group.

We are looking for best practices not only from a technical implementation perspective but also in terms of financial accuracy and audit compliance.

Background and Constraints:

  • NetSuite is an audit-compliant ERP system and already performs tax calculations.
  • The extracted journal entry item-level data includes tax information, so recalculating taxes in SAP must be avoided.
  • The source data contains over 40,000 journal entry lines per month, and uploading the full dataset can take 3–5 hours, which is not acceptable due to performance constraints.

Our current approach:

  • Instead of uploading item-level journal entries, we are planning to upload summary-level data by G/L account.

Request:

  • Do you see any concerns or potential risks with this summary-data upload approach?
  • Are there any technical or financial integrity issues we should be aware of?
  • What best practices would you recommend to ensure accurate and efficient integration?

Your experience and guidance would be very helpful. Thank you in advance!

Best regards,
Takashi

entry.title: Re: SAP Analytics Cloud for planning - Data Action for Ag...

Regards

Bogdan

There is issue while I am using 'jobscheduler' standard plan in my existing app, here is the error :

Best Regards,

Satish Kumar

entry.title: Re: CAP Hybrid testing using PostgreSQL on SAP BTP, hyper...
entry.content:
After some struggles myself I managed to make it work from VSCode.

It turns out that PostgreSQL on BTP rejects non-SSL connections by default (see https://help.sap.com/docs/postgresql-on-sap-btp/postgresql-on-sap-btp-hyperscaler-option/using-secure-socket-layer-ssl-encryption-for-postgresql-db-instances). So you need to copy over the ssl cert from the service key as well.

Additionally, you need to increase the default timeout so your SSH tunnel has time to process the connection request.

This works for me, after opening the SSH tunnel on port 12345:

"cds": {
  "requires": {
    "[pg-hybrid]": {
      "db": {
        "kind": "postgres",
        "credentials": {
          "hostname": "127.0.0.1",
          "port": "12345",
          "username": "...",
          "password": "...",
          "dbname": "...",
          "sslcert": "-----BEGIN CERTIFICATE-----\n...\n-----END CERTIFICATE-----",
          "sslrootcert": "-----BEGIN CERTIFICATE-----\n...\n-----END CERTIFICATE-----"
        },
        "pool": {
          "acquireTimeoutMillis": 2000
        }
      }
    }
  }
}

entry.title: Re: LOOP AT table with a Reference Variable
entry.content: Hi Zero number, thanks you for your time. As the imágenes says, te variables num, connection and var all of them are Reference Variable. The reason is because they point an Instance called lcl_connnection with the Operator NEW, and they are calling a method defined in the loca types. So thal tyoes

entry.title: How to get a negative value in selection criteria of query report?
entry.content:
Hello,

Is it possible to get a negative value in the selection criteria of a query report?

Please see the sample below:

DECLARE @dayfrom AS INT
DECLARE @dayto AS INT
Select @dayfrom = T0.NumOfDays FROM CDC1 T0 Where T0.NumOfDays = '[%0]' Select @dayfrom = '[%0]'
Select @dayto = T0.NumOfDays FROM CDC1 T0 Where T0.NumOfDays = '[%1]' Select @dayto = '[%1]'

While executing this, we can add a negative sign and the report would should data as per selection criteria.

Ex. -10 & -20

Is it possible to make changes in the report so that the user enters a positive value but the query checks it for negative value, ex: in selection criteria user enters 10 and 20 but the result should display it based on  -10 and -20?

Regards,

Joseph

entry.title: Re: Building SAP UI with Salesforce data using REST Api’s
entry.content:
I have a salesforce developer account created.
When i created the destination in BTP I get this message - 
HTTP request (without authentication) to Salesforce destination succeeded.

I have added the authentication details but does not seem to work.

I am struggling on how to use this in SAP Build Apps and get information. Can you help me please?
